content.text:
Task: Explore the GitHub repository https://github.com/kolisachint/pycortex - the Python migration of hoocode.

I need to understand:
1. The package structure (directory layout, how it's organized) - look at /packages directory
2. How the multi-level modular packaging works - check pyproject.toml and the package directories
3. How CI/CD works - check .github/workflows/
4. The design docs - check docs/
5. The publish/packaging scripts - check scripts/

Please read the pyproject.toml, list the packages/ directory recursively (depth 3), show the .github/workflows/ files, and read docs/ design documents if present.

Return all findings in detail.
